title: Tech Reborn Armor Rebalancing for Prominence II
description: This Datapack makes Tech Reborn Armor more expensive so the armor isnt that easy to get. This affects both Nano and Quantum armor -Made for Prominence II
body:
- swapped all redstone crystals in Nano armor to Lapotron Crystals  
- Swapped all Advanced Circuits to industrial Circuits  
  
- added Lapotronic Orbpacks to all Quantum armor pieces as well as the lapotronic orb to ensure users only can get it post end without prior tech knowledge
